data.title: Court grants Perplexity temporary permission to access Amazon's site with 'agentic AI'
data.description: Perplexity's Comet browser will be able to continue using Amazon.com while an appeal proceeds.

data.title: UNFI ramps up AI, digital push across supply chain
data.description: The company also said its professional and digital services business is growing faster than the rest of UNFI.

data.title: Provi expands its enterprise platform for restaurant chains
data.description: It has been expanding its presence among enterprise restaurant groups, positioning its platform as a system for managing beverage procurement across large, distributed networks.

data.title: Doba adds Walmart Marketplace integration for drop shipping sellers
data.description: Its CEO said Doba is focused on simplifying onboarding and ongoing operations for sellers expanding on Walmart’s platform.
